TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Taulungcu, title = Taulungcu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taulungcu} }

S.FORM: == Taulungcu Ś§ßś≠¶śĒŹśóŹ == Ś§ßś≠¶Ś£†śóŹ(Ś§ßś≠¶Ś£†Ť™ě:Taivoan) . Taulungcu "Taulungcu a kamu, Taivoan" anucaan Tamancu han, Taywan tungusay Taywan Yincumincu, Cin-caw anisulitan u "S-se-su-ban, "I-san su-ban" han, kasumamadan a niyazu' i Taynan masatancunay a lala' "saayawan i Ta-ney a kenis, buyu' a kenisan", ayza angangan maliwahliwah i Taynan, Takaw tusaay a kakitizaan tu apuyuay a buyu' atu sahelung sawacan, 2009 a mihcaan ayaw nu papa a baliyus,Takaw a kuwan Siw-lin a niyazu' na u Taywan Taulung a niyazu' u sakatuuday a tademaw. kakilimanśĎėŤ¶Ā "ÁöĄťĄČťéģ. Taywan nuwalianay a Kalinku, Pusung izaw ku nu makazaay i satip mabulaway i Pinpucu a Yincumincu, uzuma hatu nu Taulungcu. duduc ni Cyen-win-min mipasuban'ay i kaLipunan paliayaw nipanganganan tu binacadan, imahini Taywanay a Taulungcu a iluciluc hakay malakui' ku tusa a mang ku tademaw, katuud ku cayay pangangan tu Taywan Yincumincu, wizadada' u Makatawcu. 2013 a mihcaan 11 a bulad 15 a mihecaan i Kalinku Pailasan a niyazu' nguciw tatenga'ay tu patatenga' tu tizaay pasu Taulungcu Pinpucu a tademaw "nipatatenga'an nu niyazu' a Yincumincu", mala u saayaway nipatatenga'an a Pinpucu u "nipatatenga'an nu niyazu' a Yincumincu", a niyazu'. nilaculan ŚÖßŚģĻ kakayzaan a ngangan nu binacadanśóŹŚźćÁĒĪšĺÜ Taulungcu a ngangan Taivoan aucaay Taibowan han, ngiha misengi tu nu Layak a kamu tu "Ta-man", "Tay-wo-wan", "Taywan", Cya-c-cu a tademaw lalekalan makay Taynanay, tatenga' napatizeng tu Tay-ow-wan-se "Taiouwang", mabelecay ci Lin-cin-cay, Cen-yaw-cang, zuma pasubana'aay atu misulitay tu likisi saca Taulungcu a ngangan anucaay u zumaay a niyazu' nipangangan "Taywan" namaka cacayay a tademaw kina ngangan. Wong-cya-ing zuma a pasubana'ay caay palatatenga' tuyni a kamuan. Yang-sen-cin talaayaw saaca, Taivoan,Tevorangh a ngangan anucaay niyazu' a ngangan, nu Taulung a kamu "bulad ziyazu'" anucaay "bulad kitakit" a imi, kilul tu Taulung a kamu "bulad" u buan, voan, anucaay bulan, zayhan u niyazu' tini i apuyu'ay a buyubuyu'an, mahizaay u bulad kitakit, tukamu u masatancunay a lala' tu talakaway a buyu', misengiay tu bulad kitakit. kanahatu ayaw nu pinaay lasubu a mihcaan u binacadan mahicaay izaw ku bulad a nizateng, uyni a kamu u kasatiman siacaay a niazihan. kasazuma a kakayzaan šŅ°šĽįŚ∑ģÁēį Cin-suy-cun Taulung atu Sirayacu tusaay a binacadan u kakayzaan a lisin, saca paykakitizaan nu Taulungcu salisin nu babalaki mapatahkal tu "tada mahapinang malecad", u cayay henay kaazih nu Sirayacu, pasu, salisi a demiad, paeneng i paymihcaan nu malukay a kuyumi tu 9 a bulad 15 a demiad nu labiiay a salisin. misalisin a demiad, cacayay a kung-cye, labu nu kung-cye izaw ku nipatizeng tu "tukal" atu "aenengan nu samiya". u sasalisinan, mahapinang pasazumaentu, "Tay-cu" atu "Law-cyun", nasaca zuma u malekakanaay a tuas. kasazuma nu zikuzśúćť£ĺŚ∑ģÁēį Hu-cya-iy i "2014" mitatengil tu Taulungcu a zikuc tekad a cudad "Taulung Pinpucu a zikuc masingatu atu nalimaan mita'esel" a patahkal, Taulungcu a lusid u sapakazali u nita'eselan, pakulitan tu, "atu zumaay lilisay a binacadan mahiza u Co, Bunun, Lukay atu Sirayacu mahapinang ku kasazuma". u mahapinangan a lalangawan a zihen. kasasizuma nu tademawanšļļÁ®ģÁČĻŚĺĶ nisulit nu Helan "caay patahkal tu nisupedan nu mikeliday nisaupuan a cudad" "21 Februari 1636, VOC 1120, fol. 235." namusakamu tu, Taulungcu a tademaw "atu lilisay nu bayu masukapah tu kuyzaan a niyazu', adidi' makudus ku uzip, tanayu' ku sabitingan a tangila nu heni , i tangila tadatabaki ku buhang", "malaacawa kuheni hawsa, acawa nuheni, wawa mapulung tu cacay a luma'an muneng, malecad ku lisin numita, atu zumaay a niyazu' caay kalecad ku lisin". makayni maazih tu ku Talungcu atu Sirayacu masazuma ku lalangawan. likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ duduc tu nakamuan nu babalaki, Taulungcu kasumamadad u eneng i ayzaay a A-pin "Tay-ow-wan-se" "Taivoan", kilul micumud I Taynan Sin-hwa, patizeng tu Ta-mu-cya-se' atu "Ta-bung-se" "ayzaay a bung-kow-se". zikuz masawacu nu Sirayacu, maliwasak tusa ku zazan mabulaw katukuh Cow-cen atu i buyu', masasizuma patizeng tu "Mu-kang-se" "ayzaay a Lu-kong niyazu' atu si-cay-se". zakuz mabahbah aca nu Sirayacu, miduduc tu pabaw nu cen-wona sawac, tini i ayzaay Tayna Ta-nye patizeng tu Tow-se" "Nounamou". kaliwaliwah nu ayzaay a zidayŤŅĎšĽ£ŚąÜŚłÉ Cen-cen-kung a ziday pikuwanan, i Taynan enal mukawaw tu "ciwn-tun" a lekakawaw, cunus tu kahulaman a ziday nu katayni i Taywan caay pusakamu, Layak satultul sa tayni i Taywan patadas, sakay Taynan enalay a Sirayacu ngelu' sa kunikauzip, binawlan malingatu pasayza nutimulan apuyu'ay a buyu', macelcel ku tizaaytu a Taulungcu malingatu tu pasayza nu zumaan a buyu' malimad.
S.PHON: == taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u **** == ****(****:tai*oan) . taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u "taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a kamu, tai*oan" anu ¶aan taman ¶u ńßan, tajwan tuŇčusaj tajwan jin ¶umin ¶u, ¶in- ¶aw anisur~…ĺitan u "s-s…ô-su-ban, "i-san su-ban" ńßan, kasumamadan a nijazu Ē~ ° i tajnan masatan ¶unaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° "saajawan i ta-n…ô a k…ônis, buju Ē~ ° a k…ônisan", ajza aŇčaŇčan mar~…ĺiwańßr~…ĺiwańß i tajnan, takaw tusaaj a kakitizaan tu apujuaj a buju Ē~ ° atu sańß…ôr~…ĺuŇč sawa ¶an, **** a mińß ¶aan ajaw nu papa a bar~…ĺijus,takaw a kuwan siw-r~…ĺin a nijazu Ē~ ° na u tajwan taur~…ĺuŇč a nijazu Ē~ ° u sakatuudaj a tad…ômaw. kakir~…ĺiman** "***. tajwan nuwar~…ĺianaj a kar~…ĺinku, pusuŇč izaw ku nu makazaaj i satip mabur~…ĺawaj i pinpu ¶u a jin ¶umin ¶u, uzuma ńßatu nu taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u. dudu ¶ ni ¶j…ôn-win-min mipasuban Ē~ °aj i kar~…ĺipunan par~…ĺiajaw nipaŇčaŇčanan tu bina ¶adan, imańßini tajwanaj a taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ ńßakaj mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° ku tusa a maŇč ku tad…ômaw, katuud ku ¶ajaj paŇčaŇčan tu tajwan jin ¶umin ¶u, wizadada Ē~ ° u makataw ¶u. **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a mińß…ô ¶aan i kar~…ĺinku pair~…ĺasan a nijazu Ē~ ° Ňču ¶iw tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tu tizaaj pasu taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u pinpu ¶u a tad…ômaw "nipatat…ôŇča Ē~ °an nu nijazu Ē~ ° a jin ¶umin ¶u", mar~…ĺa u saajawaj nipatat…ôŇča Ē~ °an a pinpu ¶u u "nipatat…ôŇča Ē~ °an nu nijazu Ē~ ° a jin ¶umin ¶u", a nijazu Ē~ °. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ** kakajzaan a ŇčaŇčan nu bina ¶adan**** taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a ŇčaŇčan tai*oan au ¶aaj taibowan ńßan, Ňčińßa mis…ôŇči tu nu r~…ĺajak a kamu tu "ta-man", "taj-wo-wan", "tajwan", ¶ja- ¶- ¶u a tad…ômaw r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan makaj tajnanaj, tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° napatiz…ôŇč tu taj-ow-wan-s…ô "taiouwaŇč", mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj ¶i r~…ĺin- ¶in- ¶aj, ¶…ôn-jaw- ¶aŇč, zuma pasubana Ē~ °aaj atu misur~…ĺitaj tu r~…ĺikisi sa ¶a taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a ŇčaŇčan anu ¶aaj u zumaaj a nijazu Ē~ ° nipaŇčaŇčan "tajwan" namaka ¶a ¶ajaj a tad…ômaw kina ŇčaŇčan. woŇč- ¶ja-iŇč zuma a pasubana Ē~ °aj ¶aaj par~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tujni a kamuan. jaŇč-s…ôn- ¶in tar~…ĺaajaw saa ¶a, tai*oan,t…ô*oraŇčńß a ŇčaŇčan anu ¶aaj nijazu Ē~ ° a ŇčaŇčan, nu taur~…ĺuŇč a kamu "bur~…ĺad zijazu Ē~ °" anu ¶aaj "bur~…ĺad kitakit" a imi, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu taur~…ĺuŇč a kamu "bur~…ĺad" u buan, *oan, anu ¶aaj bur~…ĺan, zajńßan u nijazu Ē~ ° tini i apuju Ē~ °aj a bujubuju Ē~ °an, mańßizaaj u bur~…ĺad kitakit, tukamu u masatan ¶unaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ °, mis…ôŇčiaj tu bur~…ĺad kitakit. kanańßatu ajaw nu pinaaj r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan u bina ¶adan mańßi ¶aaj izaw ku bur~…ĺad a nizat…ôŇč, ujni a kamu u kasatiman sia ¶aaj a niazińßan. kasazuma a kakajzaan **** ¶in-suj- ¶un taur~…ĺuŇč atu siraja ¶u tusaaj a bina ¶adan u kakajzaan a r~…ĺisin, sa ¶a pajkakitizaan nu taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u sar~…ĺisin nu babar~…ĺaki mapatańßkar~…ĺ tu "tada mańßapinaŇč mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad", u ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj kaazińß nu siraja ¶u, pasu, sar~…ĺisi a d…ômiad, pa…ôn…ôŇč i pajmińß ¶aan nu mar~…ĺukaj a kujumi tu * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad nu r~…ĺabiiaj a sar~…ĺisin. misar~…ĺisin a d…ômiad, ¶a ¶ajaj a kuŇč- ¶j…ô, r~…ĺabu nu kuŇč- ¶j…ô izaw ku nipatiz…ôŇč tu "tukar~…ĺ" atu "a…ôn…ôŇčan nu samija". u sasar~…ĺisinan, mańßapinaŇč pasazuma…ôntu, "taj- ¶u" atu "r~…ĺaw- ¶jun", nasa ¶a zuma u mar~…ĺ…ôkakanaaj a tuas. kasazuma nu zikuz**** ńßu- ¶ja-ij i "****" mitat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a ziku ¶ t…ôkad a ¶udad "taur~…ĺuŇč pinpu ¶u a ziku ¶ masiŇčatu atu nar~…ĺimaan mita Ē~ °…ôs…ôr~…ĺ" a patańßkar~…ĺ, taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a r~…ĺusid u sapakazar~…ĺi u nita Ē~ °…ôs…ôr~…ĺan, pakur~…ĺitan tu, "atu zumaaj r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj a bina ¶adan mańßiza u ¶o, bunun, r~…ĺukaj atu siraja ¶u mańßapinaŇč ku kasazuma". u mańßapinaŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a zińß…ôn. kasasizuma nu tad…ômawan**** nisur~…ĺit nu ńß…ôr~…ĺan " ¶aaj patańßkar~…ĺ tu nisup…ôdan nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nisaupuan a ¶udad" "** f…ôbruari ****, *o ¶ ****, for~…ĺ. ***." namusakamu tu, taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a tad…ômaw "atu r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj nu baju masukapańß tu kujzaan a nijazu Ē~ °, adidi Ē~ ° makudus ku uzip, tanaju Ē~ ° ku sabitiŇčan a taŇčir~…ĺa nu ńß…ôni , i taŇčir~…ĺa tadatabaki ku buńßaŇč", "mar~…ĺaa ¶awa kuńß…ôni ńßawsa, a ¶awa nuńß…ôni, wawa mapur~…ĺuŇč tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an mun…ôŇč, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺisin numita, atu zumaaj a nijazu Ē~ ° ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺisin". makajni maazińß tu ku tar~…ĺuŇč ¶u atu siraja ¶u masazuma ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. r~…ĺikisi** dudu ¶ tu nakamuan nu babar~…ĺaki, taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u kasumamadad u …ôn…ôŇč i ajzaaj a a-pin "taj-ow-wan-s…ô" "tai*oan", kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mi ¶umud i tajnan sin-ńßwa, patiz…ôŇč tu ta-mu- ¶ja-s…ô Ē~ ° atu "ta-buŇč-s…ô" "ajzaaj a buŇč-kow-s…ô". zikuz masawa ¶u nu siraja ¶u, mar~…ĺiwasak tusa ku zazan mabur~…ĺaw katukuńß ¶ow- ¶…ôn atu i buju Ē~ °, masasizuma patiz…ôŇč tu "mu-kaŇč-s…ô" "ajzaaj a r~…ĺu-koŇč nijazu Ē~ ° atu si- ¶aj-s…ô". zakuz mabańßbańß a ¶a nu siraja ¶u, midudu ¶ tu pabaw nu ¶…ôn-wona sawa ¶, tini i ajzaaj tajna ta-nj…ô patiz…ôŇč tu tow-s…ô" "nounamou". kar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß nu ajzaaj a zidaj**** ¶…ôn- ¶…ôn-kuŇč a zidaj pikuwanan, i tajnan …ônar~…ĺ mukawaw tu " ¶iwn-tun" a r~…ĺ…ôkakawaw, ¶unus tu kańßur~…ĺaman a zidaj nu katajni i tajwan ¶aaj pusakamu, r~…ĺajak satur~…ĺtur~…ĺ sa tajni i tajwan patadas, sakaj tajnan …ônar~…ĺaj a siraja ¶u Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° sa kunikauzip, binawr~…ĺan mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasajza nutimur~…ĺan apuju Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ °, ma ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ ku tizaajtu a taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu pasajza nu zumaan a buju Ē~ ° mar~…ĺimad.
S.FORM: == Taulungcu Ś§ßś≠¶śĒŹśóŹ == Ś§ßś≠¶Ś£†śóŹ(Ś§ßś≠¶Ś£†Ť™ě:Taivoan) . Taulungcu "Taulungcu a kamu, Taivoan" anucaan Tamancu han, Taywan tungusay Taywan Yincumincu, Cin-caw anisulitan u "S-se-su-ban, "I-san su-ban" han, kasumamadan a niyazu' i Taynan masatancunay a lala' "saayawan i Ta-ney a kenis, buyu' a kenisan", ayza angangan maliwahliwah i Taynan, Takaw tusaay a kakitizaan tu apuyuay a buyu' atu sahelung sawacan, 2009 a mihcaan ayaw nu papa a baliyus,Takaw a kuwan Siw-lin a niyazu' na u Taywan Taulung a niyazu' u sakatuuday a tademaw. kakilimanśĎėŤ¶Ā "ÁöĄťĄČťéģ. Taywan nuwalianay a Kalinku, Pusung izaw ku nu makazaay i satip mabulaway i Pinpucu a Yincumincu, uzuma hatu nu Taulungcu. duduc ni Cyen-win-min mipasuban'ay i kaLipunan paliayaw nipanganganan tu binacadan, imahini Taywanay a Taulungcu a iluciluc hakay malakui' ku tusa a mang ku tademaw, katuud ku cayay pangangan tu Taywan Yincumincu, wizadada' u Makatawcu. 2013 a mihcaan 11 a bulad 15 a mihecaan i Kalinku Pailasan a niyazu' nguciw tatenga'ay tu patatenga' tu tizaay pasu Taulungcu Pinpucu a tademaw "nipatatenga'an nu niyazu' a Yincumincu", mala u saayaway nipatatenga'an a Pinpucu u "nipatatenga'an nu niyazu' a Yincumincu", a niyazu'. nilaculan ŚÖßŚģĻ kakayzaan a ngangan nu binacadanśóŹŚźćÁĒĪšĺÜ Taulungcu a ngangan Taivoan aucaay Taibowan han, ngiha misengi tu nu Layak a kamu tu "Ta-man", "Tay-wo-wan", "Taywan", Cya-c-cu a tademaw lalekalan makay Taynanay, tatenga' napatizeng tu Tay-ow-wan-se "Taiouwang", mabelecay ci Lin-cin-cay, Cen-yaw-cang, zuma pasubana'aay atu misulitay tu likisi saca Taulungcu a ngangan anucaay u zumaay a niyazu' nipangangan "Taywan" namaka cacayay a tademaw kina ngangan. Wong-cya-ing zuma a pasubana'ay caay palatatenga' tuyni a kamuan. Yang-sen-cin talaayaw saaca, Taivoan,Tevorangh a ngangan anucaay niyazu' a ngangan, nu Taulung a kamu "bulad ziyazu'" anucaay "bulad kitakit" a imi, kilul tu Taulung a kamu "bulad" u buan, voan, anucaay bulan, zayhan u niyazu' tini i apuyu'ay a buyubuyu'an, mahizaay u bulad kitakit, tukamu u masatancunay a lala' tu talakaway a buyu', misengiay tu bulad kitakit. kanahatu ayaw nu pinaay lasubu a mihcaan u binacadan mahicaay izaw ku bulad a nizateng, uyni a kamu u kasatiman siacaay a niazihan. kasazuma a kakayzaan šŅ°šĽįŚ∑ģÁēį Cin-suy-cun Taulung atu Sirayacu tusaay a binacadan u kakayzaan a lisin, saca paykakitizaan nu Taulungcu salisin nu babalaki mapatahkal tu "tada mahapinang malecad", u cayay henay kaazih nu Sirayacu, pasu, salisi a demiad, paeneng i paymihcaan nu malukay a kuyumi tu 9 a bulad 15 a demiad nu labiiay a salisin. misalisin a demiad, cacayay a kung-cye, labu nu kung-cye izaw ku nipatizeng tu "tukal" atu "aenengan nu samiya". u sasalisinan, mahapinang pasazumaentu, "Tay-cu" atu "Law-cyun", nasaca zuma u malekakanaay a tuas. kasazuma nu zikuzśúćť£ĺŚ∑ģÁēį Hu-cya-iy i "2014" mitatengil tu Taulungcu a zikuc tekad a cudad "Taulung Pinpucu a zikuc masingatu atu nalimaan mita'esel" a patahkal, Taulungcu a lusid u sapakazali u nita'eselan, pakulitan tu, "atu zumaay lilisay a binacadan mahiza u Co, Bunun, Lukay atu Sirayacu mahapinang ku kasazuma". u mahapinangan a lalangawan a zihen. kasasizuma nu tademawanšļļÁ®ģÁČĻŚĺĶ nisulit nu Helan "caay patahkal tu nisupedan nu mikeliday nisaupuan a cudad" "21 Februari 1636, VOC 1120, fol. 235." namusakamu tu, Taulungcu a tademaw "atu lilisay nu bayu masukapah tu kuyzaan a niyazu', adidi' makudus ku uzip, tanayu' ku sabitingan a tangila nu heni , i tangila tadatabaki ku buhang", "malaacawa kuheni hawsa, acawa nuheni, wawa mapulung tu cacay a luma'an muneng, malecad ku lisin numita, atu zumaay a niyazu' caay kalecad ku lisin". makayni maazih tu ku Talungcu atu Sirayacu masazuma ku lalangawan. likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ duduc tu nakamuan nu babalaki, Taulungcu kasumamadad u eneng i ayzaay a A-pin "Tay-ow-wan-se" "Taivoan", kilul micumud I Taynan Sin-hwa, patizeng tu Ta-mu-cya-se' atu "Ta-bung-se" "ayzaay a bung-kow-se". zikuz masawacu nu Sirayacu, maliwasak tusa ku zazan mabulaw katukuh Cow-cen atu i buyu', masasizuma patizeng tu "Mu-kang-se" "ayzaay a Lu-kong niyazu' atu si-cay-se". zakuz mabahbah aca nu Sirayacu, miduduc tu pabaw nu cen-wona sawac, tini i ayzaay Tayna Ta-nye patizeng tu Tow-se" "Nounamou". kaliwaliwah nu ayzaay a zidayŤŅĎšĽ£ŚąÜŚłÉ Cen-cen-kung a ziday pikuwanan, i Taynan enal mukawaw tu "ciwn-tun" a lekakawaw, cunus tu kahulaman a ziday nu katayni i Taywan caay pusakamu, Layak satultul sa tayni i Taywan patadas, sakay Taynan enalay a Sirayacu ngelu' sa kunikauzip, binawlan malingatu pasayza nutimulan apuyu'ay a buyu', macelcel ku tizaaytu a Taulungcu malingatu tu pasayza nu zumaan a buyu' malimad.
S.PHON: == taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u **** == ****(****:tai*oan) . taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u "taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a kamu, tai*oan" anu ¶aan taman ¶u ńßan, tajwan tuŇčusaj tajwan jin ¶umin ¶u, ¶in- ¶aw anisur~…ĺitan u "s-s…ô-su-ban, "i-san su-ban" ńßan, kasumamadan a nijazu Ē~ ° i tajnan masatan ¶unaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° "saajawan i ta-n…ô a k…ônis, buju Ē~ ° a k…ônisan", ajza aŇčaŇčan mar~…ĺiwańßr~…ĺiwańß i tajnan, takaw tusaaj a kakitizaan tu apujuaj a buju Ē~ ° atu sańß…ôr~…ĺuŇč sawa ¶an, **** a mińß ¶aan ajaw nu papa a bar~…ĺijus,takaw a kuwan siw-r~…ĺin a nijazu Ē~ ° na u tajwan taur~…ĺuŇč a nijazu Ē~ ° u sakatuudaj a tad…ômaw. kakir~…ĺiman** "***. tajwan nuwar~…ĺianaj a kar~…ĺinku, pusuŇč izaw ku nu makazaaj i satip mabur~…ĺawaj i pinpu ¶u a jin ¶umin ¶u, uzuma ńßatu nu taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u. dudu ¶ ni ¶j…ôn-win-min mipasuban Ē~ °aj i kar~…ĺipunan par~…ĺiajaw nipaŇčaŇčanan tu bina ¶adan, imańßini tajwanaj a taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ ńßakaj mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° ku tusa a maŇč ku tad…ômaw, katuud ku ¶ajaj paŇčaŇčan tu tajwan jin ¶umin ¶u, wizadada Ē~ ° u makataw ¶u. **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a mińß…ô ¶aan i kar~…ĺinku pair~…ĺasan a nijazu Ē~ ° Ňču ¶iw tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tu tizaaj pasu taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u pinpu ¶u a tad…ômaw "nipatat…ôŇča Ē~ °an nu nijazu Ē~ ° a jin ¶umin ¶u", mar~…ĺa u saajawaj nipatat…ôŇča Ē~ °an a pinpu ¶u u "nipatat…ôŇča Ē~ °an nu nijazu Ē~ ° a jin ¶umin ¶u", a nijazu Ē~ °. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ** kakajzaan a ŇčaŇčan nu bina ¶adan**** taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a ŇčaŇčan tai*oan au ¶aaj taibowan ńßan, Ňčińßa mis…ôŇči tu nu r~…ĺajak a kamu tu "ta-man", "taj-wo-wan", "tajwan", ¶ja- ¶- ¶u a tad…ômaw r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan makaj tajnanaj, tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° napatiz…ôŇč tu taj-ow-wan-s…ô "taiouwaŇč", mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj ¶i r~…ĺin- ¶in- ¶aj, ¶…ôn-jaw- ¶aŇč, zuma pasubana Ē~ °aaj atu misur~…ĺitaj tu r~…ĺikisi sa ¶a taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a ŇčaŇčan anu ¶aaj u zumaaj a nijazu Ē~ ° nipaŇčaŇčan "tajwan" namaka ¶a ¶ajaj a tad…ômaw kina ŇčaŇčan. woŇč- ¶ja-iŇč zuma a pasubana Ē~ °aj ¶aaj par~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tujni a kamuan. jaŇč-s…ôn- ¶in tar~…ĺaajaw saa ¶a, tai*oan,t…ô*oraŇčńß a ŇčaŇčan anu ¶aaj nijazu Ē~ ° a ŇčaŇčan, nu taur~…ĺuŇč a kamu "bur~…ĺad zijazu Ē~ °" anu ¶aaj "bur~…ĺad kitakit" a imi, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu taur~…ĺuŇč a kamu "bur~…ĺad" u buan, *oan, anu ¶aaj bur~…ĺan, zajńßan u nijazu Ē~ ° tini i apuju Ē~ °aj a bujubuju Ē~ °an, mańßizaaj u bur~…ĺad kitakit, tukamu u masatan ¶unaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ °, mis…ôŇčiaj tu bur~…ĺad kitakit. kanańßatu ajaw nu pinaaj r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan u bina ¶adan mańßi ¶aaj izaw ku bur~…ĺad a nizat…ôŇč, ujni a kamu u kasatiman sia ¶aaj a niazińßan. kasazuma a kakajzaan **** ¶in-suj- ¶un taur~…ĺuŇč atu siraja ¶u tusaaj a bina ¶adan u kakajzaan a r~…ĺisin, sa ¶a pajkakitizaan nu taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u sar~…ĺisin nu babar~…ĺaki mapatańßkar~…ĺ tu "tada mańßapinaŇč mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad", u ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj kaazińß nu siraja ¶u, pasu, sar~…ĺisi a d…ômiad, pa…ôn…ôŇč i pajmińß ¶aan nu mar~…ĺukaj a kujumi tu * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad nu r~…ĺabiiaj a sar~…ĺisin. misar~…ĺisin a d…ômiad, ¶a ¶ajaj a kuŇč- ¶j…ô, r~…ĺabu nu kuŇč- ¶j…ô izaw ku nipatiz…ôŇč tu "tukar~…ĺ" atu "a…ôn…ôŇčan nu samija". u sasar~…ĺisinan, mańßapinaŇč pasazuma…ôntu, "taj- ¶u" atu "r~…ĺaw- ¶jun", nasa ¶a zuma u mar~…ĺ…ôkakanaaj a tuas. kasazuma nu zikuz**** ńßu- ¶ja-ij i "****" mitat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a ziku ¶ t…ôkad a ¶udad "taur~…ĺuŇč pinpu ¶u a ziku ¶ masiŇčatu atu nar~…ĺimaan mita Ē~ °…ôs…ôr~…ĺ" a patańßkar~…ĺ, taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a r~…ĺusid u sapakazar~…ĺi u nita Ē~ °…ôs…ôr~…ĺan, pakur~…ĺitan tu, "atu zumaaj r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj a bina ¶adan mańßiza u ¶o, bunun, r~…ĺukaj atu siraja ¶u mańßapinaŇč ku kasazuma". u mańßapinaŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a zińß…ôn. kasasizuma nu tad…ômawan**** nisur~…ĺit nu ńß…ôr~…ĺan " ¶aaj patańßkar~…ĺ tu nisup…ôdan nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nisaupuan a ¶udad" "** f…ôbruari ****, *o ¶ ****, for~…ĺ. ***." namusakamu tu, taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u a tad…ômaw "atu r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj nu baju masukapańß tu kujzaan a nijazu Ē~ °, adidi Ē~ ° makudus ku uzip, tanaju Ē~ ° ku sabitiŇčan a taŇčir~…ĺa nu ńß…ôni , i taŇčir~…ĺa tadatabaki ku buńßaŇč", "mar~…ĺaa ¶awa kuńß…ôni ńßawsa, a ¶awa nuńß…ôni, wawa mapur~…ĺuŇč tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an mun…ôŇč, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺisin numita, atu zumaaj a nijazu Ē~ ° ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺisin". makajni maazińß tu ku tar~…ĺuŇč ¶u atu siraja ¶u masazuma ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. r~…ĺikisi** dudu ¶ tu nakamuan nu babar~…ĺaki, taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u kasumamadad u …ôn…ôŇč i ajzaaj a a-pin "taj-ow-wan-s…ô" "tai*oan", kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mi ¶umud i tajnan sin-ńßwa, patiz…ôŇč tu ta-mu- ¶ja-s…ô Ē~ ° atu "ta-buŇč-s…ô" "ajzaaj a buŇč-kow-s…ô". zikuz masawa ¶u nu siraja ¶u, mar~…ĺiwasak tusa ku zazan mabur~…ĺaw katukuńß ¶ow- ¶…ôn atu i buju Ē~ °, masasizuma patiz…ôŇč tu "mu-kaŇč-s…ô" "ajzaaj a r~…ĺu-koŇč nijazu Ē~ ° atu si- ¶aj-s…ô". zakuz mabańßbańß a ¶a nu siraja ¶u, midudu ¶ tu pabaw nu ¶…ôn-wona sawa ¶, tini i ajzaaj tajna ta-nj…ô patiz…ôŇč tu tow-s…ô" "nounamou". kar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß nu ajzaaj a zidaj**** ¶…ôn- ¶…ôn-kuŇč a zidaj pikuwanan, i tajnan …ônar~…ĺ mukawaw tu " ¶iwn-tun" a r~…ĺ…ôkakawaw, ¶unus tu kańßur~…ĺaman a zidaj nu katajni i tajwan ¶aaj pusakamu, r~…ĺajak satur~…ĺtur~…ĺ sa tajni i tajwan patadas, sakaj tajnan …ônar~…ĺaj a siraja ¶u Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° sa kunikauzip, binawr~…ĺan mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasajza nutimur~…ĺan apuju Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ °, ma ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ ku tizaajtu a taur~…ĺuŇč ¶u mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu pasajza nu zumaan a buju Ē~ ° mar~…ĺimad.
